items.title: Bluesky names Toni Schneider CEO
items.summary: Toni Schneider is now Bluesky's permanent CEO, making permanent the role he has held on an interim basis since March.

items.title: Summer of Standard.site
items.summary: We've partnered with three blogging platforms built on AT Protocol — Offprint, Leaflet, and pckt.blog — to give you 25% off any annual plan this summer.

items.title: Bluesky Service Interruption Update (April 20)
items.summary: An update on service interruptions due to an ongoing DDoS attack.

items.title: Bluesky Service Interruption Update (Morning of April 17)
items.summary: An update on service interruptions due to an ongoing DDoS attack.

items.title: Bluesky Service Interruption Update (Afternoon of April 17)
items.summary: An update on service interruptions due to an ongoing DDoS attack.

items.title: Bluesky Service Interruption
items.summary: An update on the service interruption which began 11:40pm PDT on April 15, 2026.

items.title: Bluesky's 2025 $100M Series B Lays Foundation for Open Social Web
items.summary: In April 2025, Bluesky raised $100 million in Series B funding led by Bain Capital Crypto. Since our Series A, we've grown from 13 million to over 43 million global users.

items.title: Bluesky、新たな章の始まり
items.summary: Bluesky をゼロから築き上げる、濃密で素晴らしい年月を経て、私はCEOの職を退き、最高イノベーション責任者（CIO、Chief Innovation Officer）という新しい役割へ移行することを決断しました。

items.title: A New Chapter for Bluesky
items.summary: After several intense and incredible years building Bluesky from the ground up, I've decided to step back as CEO and transition to a new role as Bluesky's Chief Innovation Officer.

items.title: Coming Off the Bench for Bluesky
items.summary: I'm excited to tell you that I will serve as interim CEO at Bluesky, a company whose mission I believe in deeply.

items.title: 「#確かな情報を得る訓練」3DAYアクションを行います
items.summary: Blueskyは「#確かな情報を得る訓練」として、情報の「拡散」ではなく「見極める力」を養う3日間の取り組みを行います。災害時に備え、情報の受け取り方を平時から整えることを呼びかけます。

items.title: Bluesky 2025 Transparency Report
items.summary: Throughout 2025, our Trust & Safety work was guided by the premise that social media should serve the people using it. Our transparency report provides data and details about those investments, and the progress we made this year.

items.title: 2025 Transparency Report Overview
items.summary: In 2025, as Bluesky grew from 25 million to 41 million users, we improved the trust and safety infrastructure to better enable our mission. Here's what that looks like in plain language.

items.title: 2026年のBluesky予測
items.summary: 今年人々がオンラインでどのような行動をとるかについての予測と、それに応えるために私たちがどのようにBlueskyを構築しているか、その一部を共有したいと思います。

items.title: Bluesky in 2026: Predictions
items.summary: As we head into 2026, we wanted to share a few predictions about what we think people will do online this year, with a taste of how we're building Bluesky to meet them there.

items.title: What's Next at Bluesky
items.summary: As we head into 2026, we're entering a new phase for the Bluesky app. Last year was about scaling through rapid growth and getting the fundamentals in place. This year is about leaning into what's working and investing more intentionally in the things that make Bluesky different.

items.title: The Smart Money Is on Bluesky
items.summary: Since Bluesky launched, economists, investment strategists, and financial commentators have been building a finance community here, post by post. Now, it’s breaking out.

items.title: Find Your Friends on Bluesky
items.summary: We're introducing Find Friends — a contact import feature that makes it easy to find people you know on Bluesky without compromising your privacy.

items.title: Updates to Our Moderation Process
items.summary: We're improving our in-app reporting and introducing new moderation systems and processes to better serve the Bluesky community.

items.title: The World Series Was Electric — So Was Bluesky
items.summary: “How can you not be romantic about baseball?” — Moneyball 2011

items.title: Progress Update: Building Healthier Social Media
items.summary: Over the next few months, we’ll be iterating on the systems that make Bluesky a better place for healthy conversations. Some experiments will stick, others will evolve, and we’ll share what we learn along the way.

items.title: Bluesky's Patent Non-Aggression Pledge
items.summary: Bluesky develops open protocols. We're taking a short and simple patent non-aggression pledge to ensure that everybody feels confident building on them.

items.title: Building Healthier Social Media: Updated Guidelines and New Features
items.summary: Public discourse on social media has grown toxic and divisive, but unlike other platforms, Bluesky is building a social web that empowers people instead of exploiting them.

items.title: Our Approach to Age Assurance
items.summary: We’re committed to keeping our community informed as we navigate new regional regulations.

items.title: Our Response to Mississippi’s Age Assurance Law
items.summary: A new Mississippi law requires us to block full access to Bluesky unless all users complete age checks. We have concerns about this law’s implementation.

items.title: Updated Terms and Policies
items.summary: We’re updating the language in our terms and policies to better explain our approach and provide more detail.

items.title: Working with the UK Government to Protect Children Online
items.summary: Part of Bluesky’s mission to create a more open and decentralized social web is helping users feel safe and in control of their experience. We always try to balance safety with privacy, and free expression with civility.

items.title: More Control Over Your Notifications
items.summary: Fine tune which notifications you receive, opt-in to receive push notifications from specific accounts, and receive notifications when someone likes or reposts posts you’ve reposted.

items.title: A New Form of Verification on Bluesky
items.summary: We’re introducing a new layer of verification — a user-friendly, easily recognizable badge. Additionally, independent organizations can verify accounts directly through our Trusted Verifiers feature.

items.title: New Character Limit Now Available!
items.summary: You asked, we listened.

items.title: Bluesky 2024 Moderation Report
items.summary: Throughout 2024, our Trust & Safety team has worked to protect our growing userbase and uphold our community standards.

items.title: 2024 In Review
items.summary: It’s been a big year for Bluesky! Let's take a look back at everything that’s happened in the past year.

items.title: Altmetric Is Now Tracking Bluesky Mentions!
items.summary: Now, scientists and researchers can more easily track conversation around their research.

items.title: The Engagement Is Better on Bluesky
items.summary: Bluesky is the lobby to the open web. Find and build your community here.

items.title: Bluesky Announces Series A to Grow Network of 13M+ Users
items.summary: Bluesky now exceeds 13 million users, the AT Protocol developer ecosystem continues to grow, and we’ve shipped highly requested features like direct messages and video.

items.title: Bluesky’s Current Efforts on Trust and Safety
items.summary: This is a big quarter for Trust and Safety at Bluesky, as we work on a large number of improvements. Here’s a preview of everything that is in progress.

items.title: Share video on Bluesky!
items.summary: Bluesky now has video!

items.title: Bem Vindos ao Bluesky!
items.summary: Que semana! Nos últimos dias mais de 2.6 milhões de usuários se registraram na plataforma, sendo que mais de 85% são Brasileiros. Sejam muito bem vindos, estamos muito contentes por tê-los aqui!

items.title: Welcome to Bluesky!
items.summary: What a week! In the last few days, Bluesky has grown by more than 2.6 million users, over 85% of which are Brazilian. Welcome, we are so excited to have you here!

items.title: Crie um Pacote Inicial!
items.summary: Crie um pacote inicial hoje — convites personalizados que trazem amigos diretamente para o seu espaço no Bluesky.

items.title: New Anti-Toxicity Features on Bluesky
items.summary: Trust and Safety (T&S) affects everything — from community policy and spam detection, all the way to the order that replies show up on a post. At Bluesky, the product team works hand-in-hand with T&S to design features that balance safety, ease of use, and fun.

items.title: Highlighting Community Starter Packs
items.summary: Join a starter pack today!

items.title: Bluesky Welcomes Mike Masnick to Board of Directors
items.summary: We’re thrilled to announce that Mike Masnick has joined Bluesky’s Board of Directors.

items.title: Schedule and Cross-Post with Buffer
items.summary: We're thrilled to announce that Bluesky has partnered with Buffer, a social media toolkit with scheduling and cross-posting features.

items.title: Introducing Bluesky Starter Packs
items.summary: Create a starter pack today — personalized invites that bring friends directly into your slice of Bluesky.

items.title: Tips and Tricks for Bluesky Search
items.summary: Let’s dive into all the tips and tricks for advanced Bluesky search!

items.title: Just shipped: Bluesky Direct Messages!
items.summary: You can now send direct messages (DMs) to people on Bluesky! Say hi to a friend, colleague, or a crush.

items.title: Product Roadmap
items.summary: What’s coming next? Over the next few months, we’ll be introducing some long-requested features.

items.title: How to embed a Bluesky post on your website or blog
items.summary: Share Bluesky posts on other sites, articles, newsletters, and more.

items.title: Perguntas Frequentes do Usuário Bluesky (Português)
items.summary: Bem-vindo ao aplicativo Bluesky! Este é um guia do usuário que responde a algumas perguntas comuns.

items.title: Introducing Bluesky Shorts
items.summary: We’re so excited to announce Bluesky Shorts! Stop, stare, and share. Read about how to try Shorts.

items.title: Bluesky’s Stackable Approach to Moderation
items.summary: Today, we’re open sourcing Ozone, a tool that lets a team of moderators or curators collaboratively review reports, create labels, and inspect content on the atproto network. Later this week, we’re opening up the ability for users to run their own independent moderation services.

items.title: Bluesky: An Open Social Web
items.summary: We’re excited to announce that the Bluesky network is federating and opening up in a way that allows you to host your own data.

items.title: Join Bluesky Today (Bye, Invites!)
items.summary: Sign up for Bluesky! No invite code required.

items.title: Bluesky 2023 Moderation Report
items.summary: We have hired and trained a full-time team of moderators, launched and iterated on several community and individual moderation features, developed and refined policies both public and internal, designed and redesigned product features to reduce abuse, and built several infrastructure components from scratch to support our Trust and Safety work.

items.title: A New Look for Bluesky: The Social Butterfly
items.summary: A new look for Bluesky — the social butterfly — and a public web interface.

items.title: Toward Federation and an Open Network
items.summary: One year ago, the first post on Bluesky was created. Now, we're working toward federation and a truly open network.

items.title: Bluesky for Journalists
items.summary: How do I get verified as a journalist? Notable and authentic accounts interested in receiving a verification badge or becoming a Trusted Verifier can apply here . Separately from verification badges, you can also set your domain as your username . We highly encourage official organizations and individuals to do this because it links your web presence to you…

items.title: Reaching 1 Million Users
items.summary: Today, we reached over one million users on Bluesky.

items.title: Algorithmic Choice with Custom Feeds
items.summary: Our implementation of algorithmic choice lets users customize one of the most important parts of their social media experience: their feed.
